backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three UI change requirements (rename 'PERSONNEL' to 'TECHNICAL TEAM', 'LOCATION CONTACT' to 'POINT OF CONTACT', and move SIGNATURE section last) to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of each frontend file describing their roles, including PDF generation, styling, and component-level changes already applied.
frontend/index.css: Minimal Tailwind base CSS that defines light and dark OKLCH color tokens for shadcn-style design system variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point loading Inter and Oswald fonts from Google Fonts and jsPDF 2.5.1 via CDN for client-side PDF generation.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root app component rendering a sticky header, feature submenu banner, the ReportForm, and a footer with dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: Main daily field report form component with sections for project info, technical team, work performed, materials, equipment, safety, visitors, site photos, and signature; 'PERSONNEL' is renamed to 'TECHNICAL TEAM', 'LOCATION CONTACT' to 'POINT OF CONTACT', and SIGNATURE is rendered last.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module confirming no backend queries are needed since the app is fully client-side.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles defining a dark industrial OKLCH color system with safety yellow/orange accents, dark gray button component classes, and dark color-scheme for date inputs.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point wrapping the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Defines the ReportData interface and a generatePDF function that uses jsPDF to build a styled A4 PDF report with sections for project info, personnel, materials, equipment, safety, visitors, photos, and signature.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS-variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Oswald, JetBrains Mono), border radii, glow box shadows, and keyframe animations, plus animate/typography/container-queries plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 3) for the Field Report Form, listing three completed UI label/reorder features and one pending task to mirror those changes in pdfGenerator.ts.
